pageSubtitle: How to earn points in the pool

match.resultDesc: Right team wins or correct draw
match.footnote: Exact score replaces result + goal-diff. Other points stack.

group.qualifierBonusDesc: For each team correctly among the 32 qualifiers

how.lockMatch: <0>Predictions lock {{minutes}} minutes</0> before kickoff. You can edit until that moment.
how.lockTournament: <0>Tournament prediction</0> can be made or changed <0>until the end of the group stage</0> (last group match).
how.lockGroup: <0>Group prediction</0> locks {{minutes}} minutes before the first match of that group's <0>last round</0> (both MD3 matches kick off simultaneously, so the lock catches both).
how.scoringStart: <0>Scoring starts on matchday {{matchday}}</0> of the group stage. The 1st round happens before the pool counts for everyone (equity rule — the app launched mid-Cup).
how.ranking: <0>Ranking</0> updates automatically as each match ends.
